revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月十七]][[zh:七月十七]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 17|qq=July 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|qid=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|707|en|707|qid=Q399664|lt=707|1=707}} {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}}) – The fourth princess of {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenchi|1=Emperor Tenji}}, known as {{ill|Abenomiya Hime|ja|阿閇皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abenomiya Hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 元明天皇|1=Empress Genmei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q233224}}, ascended, and subsequently became associated with the 43rd Emperor, {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|qid=Q233224|lt=Emperor Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}. * [[Shōwa (Japan)|Shōwa]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|842|en|842|qid=Q24730|lt=842|1=842}} {{ill|August 26|en|August 26|qid=Q2820|lt=August 26|1=August 26}}) – In the incident known as {{ill|Jōwa Incident|en|Jōwa Incident|qid=Q11497317|lt=Shōwa no Hen|1=Jōwa Incident}}, a conspiracy by the faction of Crown Prince Tsunetada (恒貞親王) led by companions such as {{ill|Ban Kenchin|ja|伴健岑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ban Kenchin|1=tomo no kowamine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11381512}} and {{ill|Tachibana no Hayanari|en|Tachibana no Hayanari|qid=Q1062686|lt=Tachibana Itsusei|1=Tachibana no Hayanari}} was uncovered. * {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|qid=Q3577278|lt=Jōgan|1=Zhenguan}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|864|en|864|qid=Q25041|lt=864|1=864}} {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}}) – Mount Fuji erupted violently. As a result, new lakes, including those later known as {{ill|西湖|en|西湖|qid=Q11202578|lt=Saiko|1=西湖}} and {{ill|Lake Shōji|en|Lake Shōji|qid=Q11190939|lt=Shōjin-ko|1=Lake Shōji}}, were formed. * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate issued the {{ill|Kinchu narabini kuge shohatto|en|Kinchu narabini kuge shohatto|qid=Q5371034|lt=Kinchu Narukuni Shohatto|1=Kinchu narabini kuge shohatto}}, a set of regulations governing the imperial family and court nobles. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – By imperial decree, the name of Edo was changed to Tokyo, as recorded in the document {{ill|Edowo Shōshite Tōkyō to Tenasu no Shokusho|ja|江戸ヲ称シテ東京ト為スノ詔書|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edowo Shōshite Tōkyō to Tenasu no Shokusho|1=Edict Renaming Edo to Tokyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11134494}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1604|en|1604|qid=Q6738|lt=1604|1=1604}} {{ill|August 12|en|August 12|qid=Q2777|lt=August 12|1=August 12}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|qid=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}}, the 3rd shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1651|en|1651|qid=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}} {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}}) – {{ill|Takarai Kikaku|en|Takarai Kikaku|qid=Q2118326|lt=Hōrai Itsukaku|1=Takarai Kikaku}}, one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu and an early haiku poet (died {{ill|1707|en|1707|qid=Q6841|lt=1707|1=1707}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7th year (leap July) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – {{ill|Yamakawa Kenjirō|en|Yamakawa Kenjirō|qid=Q704632|lt=Yamakawa Kenjirō|1=Yamakawa Kenjirō}}, an educator (died {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|785|en|785|qid=Q30554|lt=785|1=785}} {{ill|August 30|en|August 30|qid=Q2818|lt=August 30|1=August 30}}) – {{ill|Ōmi no Mifune|en|Ōmi no Mifune|qid=Q5014663|lt=Awami Mifune|1=Ōmi no Mifune}}, a courtier from the Nara period (born {{ill|722|en|722|qid=Q23542|lt=722|1=722}}). * {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|qid=Q2736722|lt=Kankō|1=Kankō}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1008|en|1008|qid=Q19235|lt=1008|1=1008}} {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yoshikane|en|Fujiwara no Yoshikane|qid=Q5507551|lt=Fujiwara Yoshitaka|1=Fujiwara no Yoshikane}}, who served as the guardian for Emperor Hanayama (花山天皇) (born {{ill|957|en|957|qid=Q23711|lt=957|1=957}}). * [[An'gen]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1176|en|1176|qid=Q19693|lt=1176|1=1176}} {{ill|August 23|en|August 23|qid=Q2821|lt=August 23|1=August 23}}) – {{ill|Emperor Rokujō|en|Emperor Rokujō|qid=Q357046|lt=Emperor Rokujō|1=Emperor Rokujō}}, the 79th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1164|en|1164|qid=Q19674|lt=1164|1=1164}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1578|en|1578|qid=Q6707|lt=1578|1=1578}} {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}}) – {{ill|Yamanaka Yukimori|en|Yamanaka Yukimori|qid=Q8047875|lt=Yamanaka Yukimori|1=Yamanaka Yukimori}}, a military commander of the Amago clan (born {{ill|1545|en|1545|qid=Q6531|lt=1545|1=1545}}?). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|qid=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Gracia|en|Hosokawa Gracia|qid=Q256864|lt=Hosokawa Gracia|1=Hosokawa Gracia}}, wife of Hosokawa Tadaoki and daughter of Akechi Mitsuhide (born {{ill|1563|en|1563|qid=Q6629|lt=1563|1=1563}}?). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1623|en|1623|qid=Q6818|lt=1623|1=1623}} {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}}) – {{ill|Yoshihime|en|Yoshihime|qid=Q11609951|lt=Gihime|1=Yoshihime}}, the mother of Date Masamune and wife of Date Terumune (born {{ill|1548|en|1548|qid=Q6551|lt=1548|1=1548}}?). * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1736|en|1736|qid=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}} {{ill|August 23|en|August 23|qid=Q2821|lt=August 23|1=August 23}}) – {{ill|Itō Tōgaigai|ja|伊藤東涯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itō Tōgaigai|1=Itō Tōgai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6561006}}, a Confucian scholar (born {{ill|1670|en|1670|qid=Q7606|lt=1670|1=1670}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1795|en|1795|qid=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}} {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}}) – {{ill|Maruyama Ōkyo|en|Maruyama Ōkyo|qid=Q405444|lt=Maruyama Ōkyo|1=Maruyama Ōkyo}}, a painter (born {{ill|1733|en|1733|qid=Q6972|lt=1733|1=1733}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1811|en|1811|qid=Q6928|lt=1811|1=1811}} {{ill|September 4|en|September 4|qid=Q2855|lt=September 4|1=September 4}}) – {{ill|Matsumura Goshun|ja|松村呉春|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumura Goshun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 呉春|1=Matsumura Goshun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q960116}}, an artist (born {{ill|1752|en|1752|qid=Q7618|lt=1752|1=1752}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|16|7|18|6|17|8|7|0717|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 7월 17일]] [[ja:7月17日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:七月十七]]
[[ar:July 17 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月十七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月十七]] {{wikidata link|Q839761}} [[Category:Days 17 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
